findings.desc: Multiple unguarded STORAGE writes (potential storage corruption)
Modulo arithmetic (division-by-zero risk if divisor unguarded)
Memory read after write sequence (legacy pattern)

oracle_finding: Integer arithmetic on CALLDATA values feeding directly into STORAGE index
oracle_reasoning: t18 = CALLDATA[t18] and t19 = CALLDATA[t18] are used to calculate the index for the SSTORE at t28 = t27.

oracle_finding: Integer arithmetic on CALLDATA values feeding directly into STORAGE index
oracle_reasoning: t19 = CALLDATA[t18] and t20 = CALLDATA[t19] both read from CALLDATA. These values are then used to calculate t23 = t15 / MEMORY[t22] which is used to calculate the final index t28 = t9 + t27 for the SSTORE.
